title: Warm up
content: The slide depicts three different cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each city is illustrated with a scene showing driving on local roads.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide introduces the theme of 'An Evolving Nation' with a focus on taxi imagery and iconic cityscapes of China. It suggests a journey through China emphasizing urban development.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching city attributes. Key aspects include local features, development strategies, and their outcomes and positive impact.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: Each city is paired with a specific development strategy: Beijing with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide presents a perspective on urban development strategies from taxi drivers' viewpoints. It emphasizes that each city employs unique strategies based on local features to enhance city development.
